content: Illustrative Moody's-style corporate credit methodology summary used for reconciliation narration. Core financial factors: Leverage (Debt/EBITDA) carries a 35% weight; Interest Coverage carries 20%. Qualitative factors: Business Risk carries 20-25% and Financial Policy carries roughly 20%. A distinctive adjustment is parent or group support, which may lift a standalone assessment by up to one notch when an issuer belongs to a stronger group. When citing this methodology, agents may say 'per this Moody's-style methodology, leverage weight is 35% and a parent-support uplift of up to one notch may apply.'
disclaimer: Illustrative methodology summary — not official Moody's methodology or ratings criteria.
